title: astragalus persicus
intro: Astragalus persicus, also known as Persian milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus persicus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus persicus can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are available in herbal markets and online stores.
